function_calls.params: preferred_time="as soon as possible", callback_type="normal", reason="language_barrier"

conversation.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?
hello? who talking who?
This is Alex from DemoCompany. Am I speaking with Meera Joshi?
Hello? Hello, sir?
Yes, hello! Can you hear me? Am I speaking with Meera Joshi?
Okay, sir. Sir, let's say I'm explained. Let's connect the call as well. Anyone available?
Yes, I'm here! Is this Meera Joshi?
yes yes sir

Meera, your account with DemoLender shows 50000 rupees pending. I need to check with the team on the best closure offer for your account — I want to make sure we get you the right figures.

Can you tell me a little about what's been going on — why the payments have been on hold?
I'm understanding, sir
That's good to hear. Can you tell me — are you currently working, or has there been a change in your income recently?
Okay, sir.
Meera, are you currently employed or do you have any income coming in right now?
do you know marathi?
हो, मी मराठीत बोलू शकतो. मीरा, तुम्ही सध्या नोकरी करत आहात का?
hello?
हो, मी इथे आहे. तुम्ही ऐकू येत आहे का, मीरा?
speak slowly mla kalat nahi ahe
I understand. Meera, I will speak slowly. Can you tell me — do you have a job right now?
मला काही समजत नाही. मराठी मध्ये बोला.
ठीक आहे, मीरा. मी हळू बोलतो. तुम्ही सध्या कुठे काम करता का?
अहो मला काहीच समजत नाही तुमचं. दुसरं कोणी मराठी बोलणारं द्या ना.

मीरा, मला माफ करा. मी एक मराठी बोलणारा सहकारी तुम्हाला कॉल करण्याची व्यवस्था करतो.
लवकरच कोणीतरी तुम्हाला कॉल करेल. धन्यवाद, मीरा. काळजी घ्या.
